title: Jeff Bennett
content:
{{Top|ga|rwp}} {{Otheruses|Jeff}} {{Person |image=[[File:Jeff-Bennett.jpg]] |name=Jeff Bennett |birth=[[1960s|1962]]
[[Wikipedia:Burbank, California|Burbank]], [[Wikipedia:California|California]],{{BookCite|author=Hischak, Thomas S.|title=Disney Voice Actors: A Biographical Dictionary|publisher=[[Wikipedia:McFarland & Company|McFarland & Company, Inc., Publishers]]|date=2011|isbn=9780786486946}} [[Wikipedia:United States|United States]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.britannica.com/place/California-state|text=California|work=[[Wikipedia:Encyclopædia Britannica, Inc.|Encyclopædia Britannica, Inc.]]|quote=California, constituent state of the United States of America.|archivedate=20230515200753}} |death= |listedpronouns=He/him |nationality=[[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] |occupation=*Singer *Voice actor |companies= |website= }} '''Jeff Glenn Bennett''' (born [[1960s|1962]]) is an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] voice actor and singer who provided the voices for a variety of characters in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' franchise. These include protagonists [[Brenn Tantor]] and [[Kyle Katarn]] from the [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'', respectively, [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in the video game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', and [[Plumestriker]] from the animated series ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures]]'', among other roles. ==Biography== ===Video games=== [[File:Kylecom.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Bennett played Kyle Katarn in ''Jedi Outcast'' and ''Jedi Academy''.]] Jeff Glenn Bennett is an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] singer and voice actor born in [[1960s|1962]] in [[Wikipedia:Burbank, California|Burbank]], [[Wikipedia:California|California]], [[Wikipedia:United States|United States]]. He worked as a singer before turning to voice work, and would go on to receive an [[Wikipedia:Annie Awards|Annie Award]]{{WebCite|url=http://www.cartoonbrew.com/top/rango-tops-annie-award-winners.html|text="Rango" tops Annie Award Winners|author=Jerry Beck|date=2012-02-04|work=[[Wikipedia:Cartoon Brew|Cartoon Brew]]|archivedate=20120603222731|nolive=1}} and a [[Wikipedia:Daytime Emmy Awards|Daytime Emmy Award]] for his work in the industry.{{WordPress|subdomain=pmcdeadline2.files|url=2016/04/43rd-daytime-creative-arts-winners-press-release-4-29-16.pdf|name=National Academy of Television Arts and Sciences|text=The National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences Announces Winners for the 39th Annual Daytime Entertainment Creative Arts Emmy® Awards|date=2016-04-29|pages=p.13|archivedate=20161012001352|nolive=1}} For the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'', his first ''[[Star Wars]]'' role, Bennett provided of the voice of protagonist [[Brenn Tantor]] as well as a [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] of''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' the [[Planet/Legends|world]]{{CSWECite|I|7|Abridon}} [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]]. Bennett subsequently voiced an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] in the [[2001]] video game ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' as well as the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], and a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] for''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' the [[March 11]], [[2002]]{{WebCite|url=http://ps2.ign.com/articles/323/323996p1.html|text=Hands-on Impressions of Star Wars Jedi Starfighter|author=Douglass C. Perry|date=2002-03-07|work=[[Wikipedia:IGN|''IGN'']]|archivedate=20020804194533|nolive=1}} video game ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''. The [[March 26]], 2002''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]'' video game ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' saw him play protagonist [[Kyle Katarn]] and a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]].''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' He also voiced Fett and the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] in''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' the [[May 15]], 2002{{WebCite|url=https://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds-the-clone-campaigns|text=Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: The Clone Campaigns|work=[[Wikipedia:IGN|''IGN'']]|archivedate=20230516140746}} video game ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'', itself an expansion pack for 2001's ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. Bennett reprised his role of Katarn and voiced a [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] for ''Jedi Outcast''{{'s}} sequel, [[2003]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''.''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' He later played{{TORcite|type=other|Credits}} [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]]{{CSWECite|III|97|Revan, Darth}} [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in the [[2011]] video game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''. ===''The Freemaker Adventures''=== [[File:Plumestriker.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Bennett played Plumestriker, a recurring character from ''LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures''.]] Bennett lent his voice to the animated series ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures]]'', beginning with "[[The Lost Treasure of Cloud City]],"{{The Freemaker Adventures|The Lost Treasure of Cloud City}} the [[June 24]], [[2016]]{{WebCite|url=http://www.thefutoncritic.com/showatch/lego-star-wars-the-freemaker-adventures/listings|text=LEGO STAR WARS: THE FREEMAKER ADVENTURES (DISNEY XD)|work=[[Wikipedia:The Futon Critic|''The Futon Critic'']]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/pBgfX|archivedate=2023-05-16}} fourth episode of the [[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures Season One|first season]], in which he voiced the [[Sullustan]] [[Nien Nunb]]. In "[[Peril on Kashyyyk]],"{{The Freemaker Adventures|Peril on Kashyyyk}} the [[June 27]], 2016{{WebCite|url=http://www.thefutoncritic.com/showatch/lego-star-wars-the-freemaker-adventures/listings|text=LEGO STAR WARS: THE FREEMAKER ADVENTURES (DISNEY XD)|work=[[Wikipedia:The Futon Critic|''The Futon Critic'']]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/pBgfX|archivedate=2023-05-16}} fifth episode of the first season, he voiced the [[Twi'lek]] [[Ignacio Wortan]] and the [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant]] [[Plumestriker]]. He went on to voice Wortan in "[[The Embersteel Blade]],"{{The Freemaker Adventures|The Embersteel Blade}} the [[August 1]], [[2017]] fourth episode of the [[LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures Season Two|second season]], and Plumestriker in{{The Freemaker Adventures|The Kyber Saber Crystal Chase}} the August 1, 2016 ninth episode of the first season, "[[The Kyber Saber Crystal Chase]]," the [[August 15]], 2016 eleventh episode of the first season, "[[Showdown on Hoth]],"{{The Freemaker Adventures|Showdown on Hoth}} the [[May 4]], 2017{{DisneyXDYouTube|video=QAI7b_gjGqE|text=Beware The Gammorean Flu | LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures | Disney XD|date=2017-05-04}} short "[[Beware, the Gamorrean Flu!]],"{{The Freemaker Adventures|Beware, the Gamorrean Flu!}}{{The Freemaker Adventures|A New Home}} the [[August 7]], 2017 seventh episode of the second season, "[[The Lost Crystals of Qalydon]],"{{The Freemaker Adventures|The Lost Crystals of Qalydon}} and{{The Freemaker Adventures|Flight of the Arrowhead}} the [[August 9]], 2017 ninth episode of the second season, "[[Flight of the Arrowhead]]." Bennett also voiced a number of incidental characters in multiple episodes; an [[Imperial officer]] in "The Embersteel Blade," the [[Lurmen]] [[Biz]] in "The Lost Crystals of Qalydon," a [[Alliance officer|rebel officer]] in "Flight of the Arrowhead," a [[Unidentified Rodian (Grummgar's associate)|Rodian]] [[junk dealer]], their associate [[Grummgar]], and a [[rebel technician]] in the May 4, 2017{{DisneyXDYouTube|video=B6YcCGeGhRM|text=Home One | LEGO Star Wars: The Freemaker Adventures | Disney XD|date=2017-05-04}} short "[[Home One (episode)|Home One]],"{{The Freemaker Adventures|Home One (episode)}} a [[rebel pilot]] in one of the shorts collected in the [[June 17]], 2017 first episode of the second season, "[[A New Home]]," and a [[stormtrooper]] in "Beware, the Gamorrean Flu!." ==Works== ===Gameography=== {|{{Prettytable}} !
